title: BSOL stability pass on main
body:
BSOL project/workspace/manifest stability pass on main; unblocks consistent `.bproj`/`.bws` resolution for corelib matrix and platform services.

## What shipped

- BSOL stability pass landed on superrepo main (`ee88edf`)
- Normative/informative doc alignment for assembly pipeline and project model

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`ee88edf`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/ee88edf)
- **Completed:** 2026-06-07

## Catalog scope

- **Workstream:** `compiler-corelib`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-corelib-complete`
